title: Sync stopped working for 4 hours
description: Our Slack-Jira sync completely stopped. No errors shown. Found out when team noticed stale data.

title: Slow sync — taking 30+ seconds
description: Used to be instant. Now our Jira updates take 30 seconds to appear in Slack.

title: Need to export all sync history
description: Compliance audit requires full export of sync logs. No way to do this in the UI.

title: Cryptic error: SYNC_ERR_4502
description: Get this error when setting up GitHub sync. No idea what it means.

title: SSO support needed for Okta
description: Security team won't approve renewal without SSO. This is urgent.

title: Sync lag increasing over time
description: Started at 2 seconds now regularly 5-10 seconds. Getting worse each month.

title: Lost data during sync failure
description: Sync failed silently and some Jira tickets didn't make it to Slack. Had to manually reconcile.

title: Onboarding wizard is confusing
description: New team member spent 45 minutes trying to set up first sync. Field mapping step is unclear.

title: Need webhook when sync fails
description: Want to be notified immediately when a sync fails rather than discovering it hours later.

title: Duplicate records after sync restart
description: After a sync failure and restart we got duplicate entries in Jira.

title: API access — when is it coming?
description: Our engineering team needs programmatic access. Was promised in Q4 last year.

title: Sync latency 15+ seconds for GitHub
description: GitHub to Jira sync is extremely slow. Much worse than Slack sync.

title: Custom field mapping broke after update
description: Last update changed something. Our custom field mappings stopped working.

title: Need batch export for compliance
description: Quarterly compliance requirement. Need to export full sync history as CSV.

title: Error messages not helpful
description: When sync fails the error says "An error occurred." Need actionable info.

title: Sync failures increasing
description: We used to have maybe 1 failure a month. Now it's weekly. Something is degrading.

title: Pricing too high for small teams
description: 20 connections shouldn't cost $500/month. Zapier is cheaper per connection.

title: Need real-time sync health dashboard
description: Can't tell if syncs are working until something breaks. Need proactive monitoring.

title: SSO blocking our procurement
description: Legal/security will not process renewal PO without SSO. Deadline is April 1.

title: Sync dropping messages under load
description: When we have 50+ updates in a minute some get dropped. No retries.

title: Would pay more for API access
description: Happy customer but our devs need API. Will increase spend if available.

title: Onboarding: took 3 tries to succeed
description: Two team members gave up on first attempt. Third time worked after I walked them through it.

title: Sync latency now 8 seconds average
description: Monitoring our sync. Average went from 2s to 8s over 6 months. Unacceptable.

title: Lost deal because of sync reliability
description: Prospect asked for sync reliability metrics. When we showed them our monitoring, they saw 87% success rate and walked. We lost a $60k deal.

title: Sync completely down for 2 hours this morning
description: All Jira↔Slack syncs stopped at 9am. No errors shown to users — syncs just silently failed. We only discovered because a customer called. Monitoring showed nothing.

title: Evaluating Zapier as backup
description: Our team is setting up Zapier fallbacks for critical syncs because we can't rely on SyncFlow anymore. If this continues, we'll migrate fully by Q2.
